label: arc-nearest-50
command: python -m ava.cli benchmark external arc-challenge sessions/2026-03-14-184859-failure-patch-v2-rerun-11m-96/checkpoints/ava-11m-failure-patch-v2.pt --limit 50 --device cuda --retrieval-mode nearest --support-corpus corpora/tool_memory_minimal_v3 --nearest-threshold 0.45 --nearest-margin 0.0 --output sessions/activity/arc-nearest-50.json
